---
name: Feature / design
about: New capability or non-trivial design change
title: ""
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

Scope: S | M | L

## Problem

What needs to change and why. State the user-visible gap or the constraint being hit, not the proposed mechanism.

## Design

How it will work. Touchpoints (files / modules / boundaries). If there's a non-obvious sequencing or layering, name it.

## Tradeoffs

What this rules out, what it costs, what we're choosing not to do. Link the ADR if this decision lives in one.

## Context

Prior conversations, related issues, the moment this surfaced. Link the seed-doc ADR by number where relevant.
